title: Escape From Letterkenny
overview: A Metalhead makes a deal with God...  This film follows the intertwining meanderings of some typical Letterkenny residents over a few highly eventful days. Some are good, some are bad, some are morally vague. All are trapped in the same town. This film is about getting out. It's about breaking the shackles that hold you back by any means necessary, even if that means embracing utter chaos. It's about standing up to your outer demon. It's about friendship. It's about blossoming love. It's about dodgy-looking drugs. It will wreck your head. Or at the very least, it will make you question what kind of God you have.

title: Born In Blue
overview: Born In Blue is produced using Unreal Engine and set in Mount Gambier (Berrin), South Australia. The story follows Lumy, a young girl who grows up in New Zealand before moving with her father to the quiet volcanic town beside the Blue Lake. In the late 1800s, time traveling villains arrive from the future, drawn to a powerful phenomenon beneath the lake and seeking Lumy herself. At the lake’s edge, her father sacrifices his life to protect her, altering the course of time. Marked by trauma and a mysterious bond to the water, Lumy grows up driven by grief and unanswered questions, turning to science while unaware she is still being hunted. Years later, alongside fellow scientist Ashton, she uncovers the truth the same force beneath Berrin fuels both the villains’ technology and her own ability to move through time. Realising what she has inherited, Lumy prepares to fight back and protect what her father died to save.

title: The Fields of Abbottsville
overview: In Ohio, late 2004, after a young religious fanatic Joshua Tinsman (Brennan Abbott) celebrates his 18th birthday. Years of indoctrination and influence from his friends discourages him from leaving. After all, it's the ideology that he and his childhood friend Stephen grew up with since birth. How can you leave something you spent your whole life working towards? Loosely based on a true story.

title: born blue
overview: PLEASE NOTE: June 2027 is not a confirmed date. It is our target completion date and may change.  Born In Blue is produced using Unreal Engine. Unreal Engine is a trademark or registered trademark of Epic Games, Inc. All rights reserved.  Set in Mount Gambier, South Australia, the film follows Lumy, a young girl who witnesses her father’s sacrifice at the edge of the mysterious Blue Lake. Growing up with unhealed trauma and an unexplainable power tied to the water itself, Lumy retreats into science while being quietly hunted by forces she doesn’t fully understand.  Years later, she forms a deep connection with a broken but kindred soul, Ashton. Together, they become scientists and uncover a dangerous truth buried beneath the lake one that links Lumy’s existence to a phenomenon capable of reshaping reality. As the past resurfaces and the hunters return, Lumy must confront what her father died to protect. Born In Blue is a story of grief, survival, inheritance, and the cost of love.

title: Trade-Off
overview: Two friends have an investment opportunity in which they go to great measures to reach their initial investment money.

overview: A Whispering Tree begins whispering the names of the lonely at midnight and luring them into fog, three college friends set out to investigate the campus legend — only to discover that the truth behind the myth is far darker than they ever imagined.

This makes life easier, but over time his wife Jasmine realises that the arm is draining him of his humanity by removing him of his own creative process.

title: Spaceballs: The New One
overview: Forty years after the events of the first Spaceballs, the galaxy is once again under threat. A threat so evil, so unstoppable, so completely lacking in any original ideas, that it has vowed to bring back the past... every last bit of it. Together, they must find Lone Starr, Yogurt, and any other iconic legacy characters fans are demanding before they discover the hard way that, while some threats you can fight, the reboot is not one of them.

overview: The final chapter. Balthasar turned all wimen on earth in to Merle and starts his conquest to rule the whole world. Nick and Luca the two only survivors of the deadly conflict angainst Balthasar, are trying to build a team that could stop the purple gigant from dominating the mordern world. Balthasar and the Boys are are pitted against each other in an epic battle that will determine the fate of Merle, Balthasar, the Boys and the future for even human beeing on earth.

title: The Ascendants
overview: The reporters call them ‘The Big Three’, the people call them the ‘ASCENDANTS’. The Man of Tomorrow, The Dark Knight, and your Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man alongside their allies must stop the infamous Dark Lord of the Sith DARTH VADER or now known as ‘SAMURAI VADER’ and his group of Watchmen from reshaping Earth and its people to his will.

title: BORN SEXY YESTERDAY: Decoding the Enigma of Beauty
original_title: BORN SEXY YESTERDAY: Decoding the Enigma of Beauty
overview: The phrase "Born Sexy Yesterday" is derived from the 1950 film "Born Yesterday." However beneath this superficial portrayal of some women lies a more complex understanding , revealing deeper narratives that resonate with many.  October 1, 1985. The chilling emptiness in Michele Avila's eyes. Her murder, a savage ballet of teenage fury, ripped through the town, festering wounds exposing the venomous underbelly of a seemingly innocent friendship. Jealousy, a serpent coiled in the heart of adolescence, struck with the force of a viper, revealing the terrifying depths of envy's reach. These weren't just girls; they were predators.  Women are born with many layers, a mix between good and evil. Ironically of all the positive tropes that can validate the existence of women, why is it that "Born Sexy Yesterday" is a trope that resonates with our male counterparts the most?

title: The Grasp Dark Within
overview: A 19-year-old man is trapped between a dark force in his mind and a small positive energy fighting to save him. As both sides battle for control, his reality distorts, forcing him into a psychological struggle for survival.

title: The Chosen: Crucifixion
overview: The sixth season finale of the popular Biblical television series, following Jesus' arrest and trial leading up to His crucifixion.

title: Outer Focus
overview: A man slowly loses everything as he tries to keep the last thing he has, sanity.

title: Sonic the Hedgehog 4
overview: Sonic the Hedgehog, joined by a new hero named Amy, faces a new technological nemesis known as Metal Sonic.

title: Carver
overview: A hangout between two brothers experiences unexplainable and intrusive interruptions.

title: Nemesis
overview: 20 years after meeting his identical twin with no explanation, a man finds that his brother is not all he seems.

title: Gatto
overview: After years of maneuvering the canal-ridden, superstitious city of Venice, Italy, a scrappy black cat named Nero begins to question whether he’s lived the right lives. Indebted to Rocco, a ruthless local feline mob boss, Nero finds himself in a quandary and is forced to forge a truly unexpected friendship that may finally lead him to his purpose — unless Venice gets the better of him first.

title: Plátano Champion
overview: A summary of the Dominican Republic's undefeated championship run in the 2013 World Baseball Classic.

title: Puro R.A.P.
overview: Five young Panamanian freestyle artists fight to turn their craft into a way of life, as rap becomes their only voice in a country that doesn’t always listen.

title: The Last Time You Were Real
original_title: The Last Time You Were Real
overview: New technology forces an alcoholic to reckon with his past.

title: The Hollow Season
overview: In the remote mountain town of Graven Hollow, autumn is more than just a season — it’s a warning. Every thirteen years, as the harvest moon rises and the leaves turn blood-red, the town prepares for a ritual it dares not speak aloud. When a group of college friends arrives for the annual fall festival, they’re drawn into a chilling legend about the Hollow Man — a masked figure born of fire and betrayal, who returns to collect a blood debt. As the friends unravel the town’s secrets and fight to survive, they discover that tradition runs deep… and some roots are soaked in horror.

title: Panic Carefully
overview: Described as a paranoid thriller about a hunt for a cyber-terrorist in the vein of Mr. Robot and The Silence of the Lambs.

title: Wife & Dog
overview: A "return to the colourful, back-stabbing world of the British aristocracy", this pic follows the relentless greed of the Fairbank family and their associates who fuel betrayal and murder in the battle for succession.

title: CONSTANT ZONE
overview: While traveling, a woman arrives at a remote place known only as 'Zone.' What starts as an ordinary trip quickly turns into a nightmare, as she finds herself trapped in a terrifying situation with no clear way out. Every attempt she makes to escape only tightens the grip of the danger around her, dragging her deeper into a fate she cannot control

title: Pierre the Pigeon-Hawk
overview: Set in NYC, the musically driven comedy centers on Pierre, born as a product of forbidden love between a hawk and a pigeon. Pierre is rejected by both communities. Tired of not fitting in, Pierre sets out on a mission to discover where he truly belongs.

title: Narnia: The Magician's Nephew
overview: The new upcoming film by Greta Gerwig.

title: Lords of War
overview: Yuri Orlov, the world's most famous arms dealer, discovers that he has a son, Anton who is trying to outdo his father by raising an army of mercenaries to fight in America's Middle Eastern conflicts, triggering a father-son rivalry.

title: S/H/V
overview: Four students, who make money by putting stolen school items online, are hired to steal a VHS tape from their Physical Education Teacher’s Office. However, things take a turn for the worse, when they find dozens of tapes, and being kids, they dare each other to partake in watching them.

title: CoComelon: The Movie
overview: A CG-animated film inspired by the blockbuster children’s show of the same name. Plot TBA.

title: Remain
overview: Architect Tate Donovan arrives in Cape Cod to design a client’s summer home. Struggling with the loss of his family, he moves into a historic home where he meets Wren, a mysterious young woman who challenges Tate’s perception of the world.

title: The Comeback King
overview: A country western star experiences a dramatic downfall and must navigate their career in free fall.

title: Ice Age: Boiling Point
overview: A madcap adventure filled with dinosaurs and lava that takes Manny, Sid, Diego, Ellie, Scrat and the herd through the uncharted regions of the dangerous Lost World.

title: Absolution
overview: When a "job" goes wrong and the people you trusted to protect you are now out to seek a debt; where do you turn? Are you sure its a safe enough place, even for a moment?

title: The New Mother Earth
overview: The New Mother Earth confronts the chaos of modern society, exposing how governments, religions, and industries enforce systemic violence and disconnection. Author Michael Lanfield argues that true freedom requires walking away from these structures to embrace self-sufficiency, intentional healing communities, and a life of nonviolence. Joined by Aurora Ananda, the film offers a spiritual blueprint for evolving into Homo Ahimsa, nonviolent beings living in harmony with Mother Gaia. It moves from critique to action, inviting viewers to choose love over fear and awaken to a world rooted in unconditional compassion and sovereignty.

title: The Stars That Fade
overview: After a tragic loss, a writer seeks comfort in publishing an anthology of horror stories. As his mental state deteriorates, his imagination blends with reality and tragedy seems imminent.

title: Inside That House
overview: After a number of strange disappearances have been reported in the area, Andrew and Jason, two brothers who received a drone for graduation, decide to film around their town to learn more about them, but then become distracted by a new girl in school who lives nearby. The two boys devise a plan to sneak their drone through an open window of her home, only to discover a terrible, dark secret.

title: Lice
overview: A gruesome death. A sealed-off high school. Something crawling beneath the skin. When a student’s terrifying breakdown shocks a classroom, an almost invisible parasite spreads through the halls, instantly twisting teens into maniacs. Locked inside with no escape, students and staff spiral into violence and hysteria. Amid the chaos, Principal Van struggles to maintain control, drowning his anxiety in alcohol before losing his grip on reality – and his head. Burned-out science teacher Mr. Shanker steps up as the only adult trying to make sense of the madness, uncovering traces of a government experiment gone wrong. Outside the quarantined halls, Detective Sikorski races to contain the outbreak before it consumes the entire town. The real horror isn’t what’s under your skin – it’s what it makes you do.

title: Air Bud Returns
overview: 12-year-old Jacob is an aspiring basketball player coping with the recent loss of his father. After he and his mother move to his dad’s childhood home in Fernfield, Jacob discovers a VHS tape of his old man playing basketball on the same court as a hoops-shooting golden retriever. Soon, Jacob begins his own adventure with a neglected golden retriever that he names Buddy.

title: The Third Parent
overview: A neighborhood Fourth of July celebration is interrupted by a ferociously bizarre anomaly who overpowers a family in order to teach them how to become better people and more compliant citizens.

title: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj
overview: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj

title: Animal Friends
overview: Two fugitive animals embark on an adventure across America to find the ranch that was once their home, healing their friendship while pursued by an equally "odd-couple" DEA agent and Fish and Wildlife ranger with something to prove.

title: In the Absence of Choice
overview: When a loyal enforcer of a vampire order begins to remember the night his childhood ended, the truth waiting in the dark threatens to consume what’s left of him.

title: Children of Blood and Bone
overview: Zelie and her older brother Tzain form an alliance with the king’s daughter, Princess Amari, and son, Prince Inan, to fight back against his brutal rule.

title: Citric Acid
overview: A young artist is stalked via the internet by a mysterious online celebrity who harshly criticizes their artwork.

title: You’ve Got Mail
overview: A mail deliverer is captured by Irish-American gangsters to launder money and drugs for them in this black comedy thriller.

title: Harmonia
overview: Rita is entranced by the mesmeric Leader and renounces her family to embrace the world of the enigmatic Harmonia commune. Her daughters Ella and Jo put everything on the line to infiltrate the cult and bring their mother home. Yet, once immersed in the commune, they find themselves inexorably drawn into the Leader’s labyrinthine web of psycho-spiritual manipulation.

title: Gone Part Three
overview: The finale in the series. How will it end?

title: Zac Power
overview: Zac Power’s position as the top teenage spy is compromised after a brilliant new agent arrives. When his recklessness allows an ostentatious supervillain to steal a high-tech weapon, Zac is forced to confront his own flaws and team up with his rival.

title: Nasty
overview: After an injury sidelines Dylan’s ability to train for the Olympics, the determined gymnast must regain the trust of her demanding coach while facing off against a prodigious new competitor threatening to eclipse her place in the spotlight.

title: Dead Soldier II
overview: Reese Cadler has moved to a country-side town after being attacked by The Soldier, a gas mask wearing killer  whom, unfathomably so, has managed to survived multiple gunshot wounds and evade police. One year later, he’s come back, and the war is not yet over.

title: My Joint with John
overview: A once-hopeful screenwriter on the brink of burnout shares one last joint with his stoner best friend.

title: Mindshare: The Download
overview: After joining Mindshare, Evan begins experiencing vivid flashes of a life he doesn't remember. The company insists these are normal side effects of neural acclimation, but Evan soon discovers that his memories have been edited, replaced, and repurposed. As he uncovers the identity of the man whose memories he carries, Evan realizes he is living a borrowed life, and Mindshare will do anything to keep him from reclaiming his own.

title: Attack On Allford 3: Too Cruel For School
original_title: Attack On Allford 3: Too Cruel For School
overview: Rio barely survives death, only to wake up in a world cheering his demise. Meanwhile, Jacob is snatched and thrown into a brutal 24-hour countdown: eliminate Rio or get hunted. With the end within reach, who will survive the final stand?

title: Starlight & You
overview: Lily and Peter is a modern romantic drama about timing, connection, and love tested by real life. When a quiet online connection pulls two people together, distance, delay, and unexpected loss challenge what they're building. As they choose to show up for one another, their bond deepens into a love shaped by family values, resilience, and emotional truth. Warm, intimate, and universally relatable, Lily and Peter is a character-driven love story made for audiences who believe the strongest romances are earned.

title: Bleeders
overview: A drug deal with a vampire goes horribly wrong.

title: Mr. Penguin: The Movie
overview: When unexplained events begin to occur, a hidden presence reveals itself. Silent, watchful, and growing closer—Mr. Penguin is no longer just a mystery.

title: All Legs
overview: On their annual summer camp, a group of Boy Scouts are attacked in the woods by a creature with legs for arms.

title: Angel
overview: When a sex worker is consumed by the life of drugs and partying, accidentally overdosing, she embarks on a journey to better her life.

title: Ātaahua
overview: A lonely man seeks solace in an art gallery, but instead meets the face of death- Hinenui Te Pō

title: The Architecture of Solitude
overview: Tracing the hidden life of interiors.

title: The Dream of a Ridiculous Man
original_title: The Dream of a Ridiculous Man
overview: A man driven by isolation and a nihilistic view decides to end his own life, but on the eve of his fateful decision, a chance encounter with a lone woman leads him to a fantastical dream that challenges his own ideologies.

title: Get to That Place
overview: A group of kids navigate their lives and interpersonal relationships while a rumor about the end of the world spreads around town.

title: The Curse of the Silver Chain
original_title: The Curse of the Silver Chain
overview: A silver chain that appears for centuries made by warlocks in the 15th century.

title: The Inmate
overview: About an inmate who fears the outside world.

title: Catechesis
overview: An education in the faith.

title: The Suffering Tenants
overview: The enemy, the lover and the brother of a missing landlady all become entangled in this Hitchcockian chamber play, set in the mid-70s.

title: Rocky Wake
overview: Elise, long estranged from her mother Megan, visits her as she lies on her deathbed. Her mother recounts a life-changing moment from the early 80s, her father’s devastating diagnosis and a serial killer stalking the town. Elise reconstructs her mother’s memories, drawing them closer as the night unfolds.

title: Pendulum
overview: Young couple Patrick and Abigail journey to a new-age retreat in New Mexico, drawn by the possibility of healing after a traumatic event. Patrick is willing to do anything to help his wife but becomes distrustful of the retreat’s enigmatic leader even as Abigail falls under her spell. As paranoia builds, the couple must determine if the group’s unconventional spiritual practices offer genuine healing or mask a terrifying truth that threatens to consume them both.

title: Backbite
overview: Follows three women, a dance competition, and the ultimate test of friendship vs popularity.

title: Bow and Apple
overview: After a scientist crash-lands in a remote jungle, he is found by a solitary runaway hunter who has built her life deep in the forest. Despite their differences, the two form an uneasy alliance when they discover they’re hunted by the same enemy—the brutal president who possesses the mythical Golden Apple, a relic said to hold immense, world-shaping power.

title: Der Hagel or yum and how I ate it all up last year
original_title: Der Hagel or yum and how I ate it all up last year
overview: Ratko makes his living selling drugs around New York City, getting from one place to another via his beloved bicycle. Misfortune continually befalls both Ratko and those around him, as though the man himself is cursed to struggle.

title: THE WALTEN FILES - Live Action Series "PILOT"
original_title: THE WALTEN FILES - Live Action Series "PILOT"
overview: A fan-made adaptation of Martín Paredes's Web Series currently in development by TurtleBak Productions. Plot TBA.

title: Limerence
overview: Nora is an eccentric young woman with a debilitating infatuation with her newspaper delivery man — a man she has never even dared to speak to... Things begin to change when one fateful night, he appears to her in a dreamlike vision where he promises her everything she has ever longed for. Convinced this is her chance at true love, Nora decides to take a leap of faith in pursuit of her prince charming’s undivided affection.

title: Now Playing
overview: After mocking the movie theatre experience, Logan finds himself trapped in a cinematic nightmare. Haunted by vengeful spirits, he must escape the theatre before credits – and heads – roll.

title: Cop This
overview: It's Grand Final Day and in a suburban police station about to be replaced by an AI 'Terminal', the two remaining cops (Nicolette Minster and Ray O'Leary) are tasked with babysitting a drug dealer for 24 hours.

title: Roots
overview: A black teenager falsifies a paternity test in hopes of convincing his white adoptive family he's their biological son.

title: The Selling Stage
overview: At the end of a twenty-five-year career, LuFisto confronts the cost of chasing a dream that asked for everything and gave back less than promised.

title: For If Night Leaves Something Undone, the Day Undertakes to Complete It
original_title: For If Night Leaves Something Undone, the Day Undertakes to Complete It
overview: A found 16mm print of a short narrative film set in the American Civil War, along with Super 8 home movies of the filmmaker’s family in Iran during the Iran-Iraq War in the 1980s, are fused into a ghostly labyrinth. Made entirely on a JK Optical Printer, the film exhumes gestures, movements, conflicts, and forces in constant resurgence.

title: Wings
overview: A student on a field trip imagines himself as a classic pilot to work up the courage to talk to his crush.

title: Shredded Cheese
overview: A mockumentary follows a young man whose uncontrollable addiction to shredded cheese begins to disrupt his daily life and worry the people around him.

title: The Devil's Due
overview: For inquisitor Jude Price, sobriety meant leaving his demons behind. But when a trail of strange disappearances leads back to his former local, he realises they've been awaiting his return.

title: The Tennis Menace Two
overview: When her father dies after challenging a divine being called "The Tennis God" to a table tennis match, Kat finally gets the chance to prove to everyone that she's the best. All she has to do is beat The Tennis God. How hard can it be?

title: Deathsman
overview: Percy Thompson (a Relocator for the Time Investigation Corporation) finds more than he bargained for when searching for his target.

title: Fuck Mr Flanagan
overview: A journey into the woods causes two stoners to question their friendship and purpose in life - while they try to avoid a devious figure named Mr Flanagan.

title: Down the Road Apiece
overview: A lonely ranch hand in rural West Texas decides to risk the only life he's ever known when he falls for a hard-pressed woman stranded in the nearby town. He makes up his mind to leave with her, but things don't quite work out as planned.

title: Wraith
overview: A psychological horror in which a man named Mark wanders a dark, deserted hospital looking for his supposedly dead wife, whose spirit continues to call out to him beyond the halls…

At 8:38 PM, May wakes up in a room with no memory. With one lifeline call, she must uncover the truth, before it’s too late. But is the voice helping her… or hiding something darker? 8 minutes is all she has.

title: Everyone's Here
overview: Cris decides to attend a birthday pre-game thrown by some old college friends. When the night doesn't go according to plan, Cris must resort to their own devices to get back home without a mode of transportation.

title: The House That Zombies Built
overview: Zombies have overrun the earth, and young Scott's the last to learn about it - so he can't be too picky when it comes to choosing his safe haven.

title: Logan
overview: In development.

title: Apophis 2029
overview: On April 13, 2029, the asteroid Apophis will pass close enough to Earth, it will be below our satellites. It will dip below and pop back out.

title: 3rd FLOOR
overview: A routine elevator ride becomes a battlefield when Maya Uche, a Black activist, and Brett Kiminski, a white conservative, are trapped together between floors. With nowhere to run, their assumptions, anger, and buried grief rise to the surface, forcing both strangers to face the truth behind their politics — and the pain that made them who they are.

title: ViQueens
overview: Fearless Viking girls Ingrid and Hedvig defy tradition to return a stowaway boy to China. Their journey spans icy fjords, Byzantine intrigue, and the fabled Silk Road, blending Viking grit with ancient Chinese wisdom, unexpected alliances, and a touch of magic.

title: Fireworks Over Yonder
overview: When a young man named Henry wakes up from a coma on New Year's Eve 1999, he discovers that the world has changed drastically while he slept. People are no longer allowed to set foot on his city's beaches, and every night unnatural lights streak through the sky towards a destination unknown.

title: DeadFrame
overview: This is an Action Thriller Film and this movie will be streaming on Youtube  For Free!! This film is coming in English and Hindi

title: The Pools
overview: A teenager trapped inside a seemingly endless aquatic labyrinth of swimming pools, towering waterslides, flooded corridors, and impossible architecture. As he ventures deeper into the surreal liminal maze and reality itself begins to unravel, a mysterious creature stalks him from beneath the water, forcing him to find a way out before he disappears forever.

title: Our House
overview: Charls Carroll stars as a Revolutionary War soldier washed ashore from the past and resurrected.

title: Wyrdo
overview: A Christmas dinner party is interrupted by an uninvited guest.

title: The Daily Blues
overview: Many Men have it rough but struggling Guitarist Odie Freeman is the definition of the daily blues

title: Some Other Story
overview: Upon moving back to her hometown, a nostalgic Noelle reunites with her childhood flame Matthew to relive their final date before leaving their lingering feelings in the past. But will they be able to?

title: 'Tis the Season
overview: Two wealthy children hold a washed-up mall Santa hostage as their Christmas Eve spirals into chaos.

title: High Stakes Holiday
overview: Two sharp-witted sisters on vacation in Las Vegas find themselves caught in the middle of a high-stakes heist and must team up with a jaded ex-MI6 agent turned security guard to outsmart a cunning international thief and save a priceless diamond gauntlet—just in time for Christmas.

title: A Place in Hell
overview: A top criminal defense attorney, known for representing unlikeable clients in high-profile cases, is a relentless workhorse at her firm and fully expects to be named partner. When another attorney joins the firm, her job is put to the test and makes her question just how far she’ll go to protect it.

title: Werwulf
overview: A harrowing tale of devotion, damnation and the devil within.

title: Mr. Irrelevant: The John Tuggle Story
original_title: Mr. Irrelevant: The John Tuggle Story
overview: The true story of John Tuggle, who was given the title after being the last pick of the last round of the 1983 NFL draft.

title: Someone Dies Tonight
overview: A group of friends sets out on a holiday road trip to Greece. On their way south, they are intercepted by a group of Croatian gangsters. Locked in a remote house, they find themselves struggling for their lives.

title: Christmas Spirit
overview: On Christmas Eve, worried Santa won't be able to see his house, a boy and his grandfather plot a holiday decoration heist.

title: The Christmas Rescue: A Big Movie
original_title: The Christmas Rescue: A Big Movie
overview: When Christmas is suddenly put in danger, Elmo and his friends must jump into action and race against time to save the holiday. With the North Pole's systems failing and chaos spreading across the city, the team embarks on a fast-paced rescue mission filled with wild obstacles, unexpected challenges, and nonstop holiday excitement. As the clock ticks down, they discover that only teamwork, quick thinking, and courage can stop Christmas from disappearing forever.

title: Los Vaqueros
overview: In the early 1990s in West Texas, three ambitious young men begin their ascent to notoriety within their small town crime organization as they navigate the treacherous underworld of drugs, gambling, and illicit deals. Their rise to power brings both wealth and danger, testing their bonds and morality in a world where trust is fragile and betrayal is commonplace.

title: Best Of Joy: Chapter 2 - History
overview: Michael Jackson, now a world-saving hero and musical icon, finds himself adrift after the chaos of the Spotlight Seven. Haunted by fame and fractured family ties, Michael embarks on a personal journey to reunite the Jackson Five—his brothers, his roots, and the harmony he lost. But the path to healing is far from simple. As old tensions resurface and new wounds emerge, Michael must navigate the complex legacy of his past while staying true to the joy that first ignited his voice.  Set against the backdrop of forgotten towns and abandoned recording studios, Michael reconnects with each of his brothers in a heartfelt odyssey across America. With Brad and Samantha by his side, and Goku occasionally crashing in with unsolicited wisdom, Michael learns that sometimes saving the world starts with saving your family.  Stripped of supervillains and secret councils, Michael discovers that history isn’t just what you’ve lived through—it’s what you choose to remember, reclaim, and rewrite in song.

title: The Angry Birds Movie 3
overview: Red faces his greatest challenge yet… surviving fatherhood while saving the world.

title: May We Never Meet Again
overview: At a packed show, a celebrated artist steps onto the stage to perform what may be his most personal piece yet. Through fragments of memory, longing, and unhealed silence, he revisits the story of a love that once defined him and the quiet devastation it left behind. As the performance unfolds, the line between art and confession begins to blur, revealing a man desperately trying to immortalize someone he is equally desperate to forget.

title: Classified
overview: "I can’t put words to you, I can’t put labels to you; but what I can put are a whole ton of emotions and feelings to you, and even then I can’t put words to those."

title: The Porch Pisser and the Princess
original_title: The Porch Pisser and the Princess
overview: The Porch Pisser and The Princess is a dark comedy about Edward, a lost teen who feels like his life has no purpose. After a strange act of rebellion against his teachers gains attention, May O’Connell, an uptight student journalist, becomes interested in his story. As the school starts panicking and the investigation grows, Edward and May get pulled into something bigger than either of them expected.

title: Faceless: Retribution
overview: After the devastating effects of Beast: The Omen, the world is in ruin. The Magician has just collected the pillars of power and harnessed them to kill half of all life, leaving Josh, Roonald, and The Beast stranded in the cursed forest. Those who remain of the MHHM characters band together in hopes of defeating The Magician once and for all, no matter what sacrifices must be made.

title: Sigma Males
overview: Two self-proclaimed "sigma males" go on the run for one wild night after doing an unspeakable act they can never come back from.

title: Without a Trace
overview: A criminal on the run attempts to break into a house for hiding. He realizes his escape will be far more difficult than originally planned.

title: The Tallyman
overview: Up and coming vigilante, the Tallyman, faces his biggest threat yet when he comes across a larger than life figure.

title: Order of the Dragon
overview: In a world teetering on chaos, elite assassin John Rico is the go-to solution when the government wants threats removed-quietly and permanently. But when a mission goes sideways, he's given one last shot at redemption: track down and eliminate Mason Ryker, the final ghost of the feared underground unit known as The Order of the Dragon. As Rico's mission leads him to a small, danger-ridden town in Serbia, the lines between good and evil begin to blur. Is Ryker the monster he's made out to be, or is there a deeper conspiracy at play? What begins as a black-and-white hit spirals into a moral storm-and time is running out.

title: Prodigal Son
overview: Aaron "Amadeus" Overlake is a visionary filmmaker revered for his genius but plagued by his own demons—a volatile alcoholic whose life is consumed by anger, controversy, and from a bitter heartbreak. As tabloids revel in his self-destruction, Aaron’s only anchor is his best friend, Santiago "Baron" Gonzalez, a charismatic actor fresh out of rehab, fighting to rebuild his career.  Bound by shared struggles and a tangled history, Aaron and Santiago navigate the toxic undercurrents of fame and friendship. As Aaron embarks on his next masterpiece, his chaotic life threatens to destroy everything he holds dear.

title: The Queen of Heaven
overview: The life of the Virgin Mary from the Crucifixion (33AD) till her miraculous departure/death (44AD). It also describes the early years of the Christian Church community.

title: Ray Gunn
overview: In Metropia, a gigantic city in an alternate future as seen from 1939, private eye Raymond Gunn is drawn into a case involving aliens, murder, and a multimedia star named Venus Nova.

title: Dune: Part Three
overview: As Emperor, Paul Atreides grapples with the consequences of his rise to power as political conspiracies and a galaxy-spanning holy war threaten the future he alone can foresee.

title: Avengers: Doomsday
overview: Beloved heroes from three distinct universes are set on a deadly collision course and face an existential threat unlike anything they've ever encountered.

title: REM
overview: Guinevere begins having disturbing nightmares about her boyfriend. As the dreams grow more vivid and frequent, she gradually loses the ability to distinguish them from reality.

title: I Wish This Was Real
overview: After having disturbing dreams, James believes he's responsible for the murders of two women and decides to turn himself in.  Detective Hobson must determine if James is bluffing or if there's something more sinister at play.

title: A Penny Weighs More Than a Soul
original_title: A Penny Weighs More Than a Soul
overview: "A Penny Weighs More Than a Soul" is a powerful documentary by Tobias Demetz (TD Films) that takes viewers deep into the untouched nature of the Dolomites. The story centers on the extraordinary life of Ulrich Senoner, who lives far from modern civilization at the secluded Malga Futura. Without electricity or running water, he embodies a nearly forgotten human resilience. This film is a visual tribute to the silent strength of a man who chooses the wilderness over comfort, showcasing the fragile balance between Alpine tradition and a rapidly changing world.

title: Marrow
overview: Madison's hopeless lesbian crush on her straight and taken roommate takes a dark turn when she learns of an arcane recipe for a love potion - one that calls for her own bones.

title: Samo Lives
overview: A vibrant portrait of Jean-Michel Basquiat, the NYC artist who revolutionized 1980s art. From street graffiti to gallery stardom, his bold Neo-expressionist works left an indelible mark on the art world and beyond.

title: Zero A.D.: The Birth of Christ
original_title: Zero A.D.: The Birth of Christ
overview: An empire in decay. A ruler consumed by fear. A prophecy that could unmake it all. When a child is born under a sign of rebellion, a terrified king sends his armies to erase him. But one woman refuses to run from destiny. As violence spreads and hope flickers, the true battle begins—not for a throne, but for the soul of mankind.

title: The Debut
overview: When Mona Friedman is cast in a bit part at a small community theater, she transforms from a shy, unassuming housewife into a zealous method actor willing to do anything to protect the artistic integrity of her marginal role—even if it means waging war against the show’s domineering director.

title: Duped (The Jezbel Experience)
overview: Alexandria Wright meets Elijah Martinez and the demonic journey begins. Elijah Martinez finds himself ensnared in a romantic involvement with Alexandria Wright, an unfaithful Covert Narcissist. She convinces him they are soulmates and they take a vow before God for His blessing with the penalty of betrayal being death. After years pass, Alexandria forgets the vows and begins cheating behind Elijah's back. Just a week before Christmas, she abruptly betrays him. To his astonishment, she swiftly transitions to a new relationship, bringing with her the unsettling secret of transmitting an incurable sexually transmitted disease to her new partner. Then came Karma. Her victims arrive to spit on her dirty grave as her demise finally arrives.

title: Rose Hobart 2
overview: Rose Hobart haunts the cinema.

title: Breaking the ICE
overview: An upcoming student-produced documentary created by Radio and Television students and faculty at Suffolk County Community College. The film explores the local impacts of ICE enforcement, deportation, and immigration on Long Island communities.

title: Watkins Law
overview: A decade after Jallow's  sexual relationship with his teacher, Miss Watkins, they meet again and are forced to confront the past they never quite escaped.

title: Jumanji: Open World
overview: Our heroes have escaped the ever-changing jungles of Jumanji before, but this time the game comes to us - as Jumanji breaks free of its console, unleashing its chaos into our world.

title: The Magnificent Raiders of Dimension War One
original_title: The Magnificent Raiders of Dimension War One
overview: A collection of rogues must gather information on a mysterious extra-dimensional threat to the galaxy in the 43rd century, and prepare a defense while fending off the first wave of attacks from horrific beings.

title: Behind You
overview: The main character goes to a thrift store; he finds an old camcorder. He tales it home then he discovers something no man should see

title: Bare
overview: In 2001 New Jersey, Mickey (Martin Anazco), Randy (Tristan Aziz), Russi (Alexis Dembowski), Ruben (Jacob Collins-Dodd), and Andre (Aaron Murillo) — a tight crew of sixteen-year-olds — move through a year of house parties, cheap highs, and quiet wars waged at home. Before adulthood, there was this.

title: Sunlight Resonance
overview: A washed-up Hollywood actor wakes up amnesiac, fights through depression, addiction, and guilt.

title: Enigma Variations
overview: Follow Paul, a man remade by the lovers who ignite and undo him across ten transformative years, in this intimate yet sweeping portrait of masculinity, sexuality and modern love — and in a world of endless choices that asks the question: will we know we found the one?

title: After Everyone's Gone
overview: After returning home for Christmas, a young woman finds herself alone in a space that no longer feels like hers. As memory, routine, and something unexpected begin to blur together, she's forced to confront what it means to stay or to leave.
